content: Can you run the analytics daily report and post a short summary to the channel?
Acknowledged. I'll prepare the daily analytics summary as requested.
Same as yesterday, please: analytics daily report and a brief summary.
Analytics daily report again, thanks. Same metrics as usual.
Deploy to staging for webapp@main — same as before, routine staging push.
Deploy to staging again after merging PR #123. No special steps — routine.
Weekly client status email: please send the usual summary to ACME Corp (highlights, blockers, next steps).
Expense approvals under $50 are basically a rubber-stamp. I always approve them without changes — it's tedious every time.
Routine deploy to staging after bumping the version. Same checklist as prior runs.
Weekly client status email again for ACME — same format as last week, please.
Just to be clear: I do not want to delegate calendar/scheduling. I prefer to keep control of my calendar personally.
I hate spending time on those under-$50 expense approvals — they pop up often and add up.
Analytics daily report again today — same scope as earlier this week.
If possible, I'd like to formalize handing off some of this repetitive work, but only with strict safeguards and explicit approvals.
